function.name: terminal
function.description: Execute a command on the user's Windows system. Use this to run PowerShell commands, open applications, manage files, install software, start programs, etc.

command.description: The command to execute. For Windows, use cmd /C commands or PowerShell commands.

cwd.description: Working directory for the command. Optional.

function.name: file_read
function.description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem. Use this to inspect code, configs, logs, or any text file.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to read.

function.name: file_write
function.description: Write content to a file on the local filesystem. Creates parent directories if needed.

path.description: Absolute or relative path where the file should be written.

content.description: The content to write to the file.

function.name: list_directory
function.description: List files and directories at the given path. Shows file sizes and indicates directories with a trailing /.

path.description: Directory path to list. Defaults to current directory.

function.name: patch
function.description: Apply a targeted edit to a file. Finds old_content in the file and replaces it with new_content. The match is fuzzy — minor whitespace differences are tolerated. Use this instead of file_write when you only need to change part of a file.

path.description: Path to the file to patch.

old_content.description: The exact text to find in the file. Must be a unique substring.

function.name: search_files
function.description: Search file contents for a pattern (regex supported). Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers. Searches recursively from the given directory.

path.description: Directory to search in. Defaults to current directory.

include.description: File glob pattern to include (e.g. '*.rs', '*.py'). Optional.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 50.

function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web for information. Returns search results with titles, URLs, and snippets. Use this to find current information, documentation, or solutions.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 5.

function.name: web_extract
function.description: Extract and read the text content from a web page URL. Returns the page text content, stripped of HTML tags.

url.description: URL of the web page to extract content from.

function.name: memory
function.description: Manage persistent memory that survives across sessions. You have two stores: 'memory' for your own notes and 'user' for user profile. Actions: 'add', 'replace', 'remove', 'read'.

action.description: Action to perform on the memory store.

target.description: Which store to operate on: 'memory' for agent notes or 'user' for user profile.

content.description: For 'add': the entry text. For 'replace': the new replacement text. For 'remove': a snippet matching the entry to remove.

old_content.description: For 'replace' only: a short unique substring of the entry to find.

function.name: approval_check
function.description: Check if a terminal command is dangerous. Returns danger level and explanation.

command.description: The command to check for dangerous patterns.

function.name: todo
function.description: Manage a task list for planning and tracking work. Actions: 'add' creates a new task, 'complete' marks a task done, 'remove' deletes a task, 'list' shows all tasks, 'update' changes task content.

action.description: Action to perform on the todo list.

id.description: Task ID (required for complete, remove, update actions).

content.description: Task content text (required for add and update actions).

priority.description: Task priority. Default 'medium'. Used with 'add' action.

function.name: execute_code
function.description: Execute code in a sandboxed environment. Supports python, javascript, bash/cmd, and powershell. Returns stdout, stderr, and exit code.

language.description: Programming language of the code. Default 'python'.

function.name: browser_navigate
function.description: Navigate to a URL and fetch page content. Returns page title, text content, and HTTP status.

function.name: browser_back
function.description: Navigate back to the previous page in browser history.

function.name: browser_snapshot
function.description: Get a text snapshot of the current browser page.

function.name: process_spawn
function.description: Spawn a background process and track it. Returns process ID for later status checks.

command.description: The command to run in the background.

function.name: process_status
function.description: Check the status of a background process.

function.name: process_list
function.description: List all tracked background processes.

function.name: process_output
function.description: Get the full output of a background process.

function.name: process_kill
function.description: Kill a running background process.

function.name: cron_add
function.description: Create a scheduled cron job. Uses standard 5-field cron expression (min hour day month weekday).

schedule.description: Cron expression: min hour day month weekday (e.g., '0 9 * * *' for daily at 9am).

prompt.description: The task prompt to execute when the job triggers.

platform.description: Platform to deliver results to (e.g., 'telegram', 'discord'). Optional.

function.name: cron_list
function.description: List all cron jobs.

function.name: cron_remove
function.description: Remove a cron job by ID.

function.name: session_search
function.description: Search past conversation sessions using full-text search. Returns matching sessions with relevance.

query.description: Search query to find in past conversations.

function.name: skill_create
function.description: Create a new skill that can be reused across sessions. Skills are stored as markdown files.

description.description: Short description of what the skill does.

content.description: Full skill content in markdown format.

function.name: skill_list
function.description: List all available skills.

function.name: skill_view
function.description: View the content of a specific skill.

name.description: Name of the skill to view.

function.name: image_analyze
function.description: Analyze an image using vision AI. Returns a detailed description or answers questions about the image.

image_path.description: Local file path to the image.

prompt.description: What to analyze or ask about the image.

function.name: mcp_list_servers
function.description: List configured MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers.

function.name: mcp_discover_tools
function.description: Discover available tools from an MCP server.

server_name.description: Name of the MCP server to query.

function.name: mcp_call_tool
function.description: Call a tool on an MCP server.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool to call.
